speaker: speaker1
text: What do you think about the equipment in our company ?

speaker: speaker2
text: We have to equip our company with a network of work stations at every office and show room as soon as possible .

speaker: speaker1
text: I also realized this issue . And office automation is essential .

speaker: speaker2
text: Besides , Internet tends to be more essential now in the information age .

speaker: speaker1
text: Good idea . A network of work stations is helpful for our management .

speaker: speaker2
text: And , to be frank , our copying machines are too slow ; our telephone system is limited in function .

speaker: speaker1
text: You are right . The current equipment of our offices really falls behind . Next week , you can provide me a catalogue of new equipment .
